name: Smoked Barbequed Turkey
recipeInstructions:
1. Place turkey in brine for 8-12 hours.
2. Remove from brine and rinse well.
3. Air dry the turkey.
4. Place turkey in the smoker with both upper and lower cavities open to expose the insides to smoke.
5. Smoke for 3-3.5 hours or longer, being careful not to dry out the bird.
6. Remove turkey from the smoker and cook using your favorite method.
7. For additional smoke flavor, increase smoking time and fuel usage.
8. Reduce cooking time by 10% for each hour spent in the smoker (up to a maximum of 40%).
9. If using a smoker/barbecue/roaster type barbecue appliance, switch to roast mode and baste with honey during the roasting process.
